topic_chinese: 你去哪儿我就跟去哪儿

vocabulary.english: As long as / So long as
Forget it / Never mind / Let it go
As soon as he arrives, he leaves

key_sentences.chinese: 你去哪儿，我就跟去哪儿。
key_sentences.pinyin: Nǐ qù nǎr, wǒ jiù gēn qù nǎr.

key_sentences.chinese: 不管天气怎样，我们都去。
key_sentences.pinyin: Bù guǎn tiān qì zěn yàng, wǒ men dōu qù.
key_sentences.english: No matter what the weather is like, we'll go.

key_sentences.chinese: 只要你高兴，我做什么都可以。
key_sentences.pinyin: Zhǐ yào nǐ gāo xìng, wǒ zuò shén me dōu kě yǐ.
key_sentences.english: As long as you're happy, I can do anything.

key_sentences.chinese: 他一来就走，我都不知道他来了。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā yī lái jiù zǒu, wǒ dōu bù zhī dào tā lái le.
key_sentences.english: He leaves as soon as he arrives — I didn't even know he'd come.

key_sentences.pinyin: Fǎn zhèng suí biàn, nǐ jué dìng ba.

key_sentences.chinese: 无论如何，我都会跟你一起去。
key_sentences.pinyin: Wú lùn rú hé, wǒ dōu huì gēn nǐ yī qǐ qù.
key_sentences.english: No matter what, I will go with you.

grammar_points.title: 一...就... — As soon as...then...
grammar_points.explanation: 一 + Verb1 + 就 + Verb2 means 'as soon as [action 1] happens, [action 2] immediately follows'. The two actions are tightly connected in time. Subject can be the same or different. This pattern implies immediate consequence or habitual succession.

examples.english: As soon as he arrives, he leaves.

examples.pinyin: Wǒ yī kàn shū jiù xiǎng shuì jiào.
examples.english: As soon as I start reading, I want to sleep.

exercises.question: Fill in: 她___进门___开始做作业。(As soon as she walks in, she starts homework.)
What does 一...就... express?
exercises.correct: Immediate consequence: as soon as action 1, action 2
options: Immediate consequence: as soon as action 1, action 2
Condition: only if action 1, then action 2

exercises.question: Which sentence uses 一...就... correctly?
option_pinyin: Wǒ yī dào jiā jiù chī fàn.
Wǒ zhǐ yào dào jiā jiù chī fàn.
Wǒ bù dào jiā jiù bù chī fàn.
Wǒ dào jiā yī jiù chī fàn.

exercises.question: Translate: 天一黑，他就回家了。
exercises.correct: As soon as it got dark, he went home.
options: As soon as it got dark, he went home.
He went home because it was dark.
He will go home when it is dark.
No matter how dark it is, he goes home.

exercises.question: Fill in: 她___听到音乐___开始跳舞。

grammar_points.title: 不管/无论...都/也... — No matter...
grammar_points.explanation: 不管/无论 + condition + 都/也 + result: expresses that the result is true regardless of the condition. 不管 and 无论 both mean 'no matter'; 无论 is slightly more formal and literary. The condition clause often contains question words (什么, 怎么, 谁, 哪里). 都 is most common in the result; 也 is also used.

examples.chinese: 不管天气怎么样，我都去。
examples.pinyin: Bù guǎn tiān qì zěn me yàng, wǒ dōu qù.
examples.english: No matter what the weather, I'll go.

examples.pinyin: Wú lùn shuí lái, wǒ yě bú pà.
examples.english: No matter who comes, I'm not afraid.

exercises.question: Fill in: ___你去哪儿，我___跟你去。
Which word is slightly more formal: 不管 or 无论?
Choose the correct sentence: 'No matter what choice you make, I support you.'
exercises.correct: 不管你做什么选择，我都支持你。
options: 不管你做什么选择，我都支持你。
只要你做什么选择，我都支持你。
一你做选择，我就支持你。
option_pinyin: Bù guǎn nǐ zuò shén me xuǎn zé, wǒ dōu zhī chí nǐ.
Zhǐ yào nǐ zuò shén me xuǎn zé, wǒ dōu zhī chí nǐ.
Yī nǐ zuò xuǎn zé, wǒ jiù zhī chí nǐ.
Nǐ zuò xuǎn zé, fǎn zhèng wǒ zhī chí.

exercises.question: What question words are typically found in the condition clause of 不管/无论?
exercises.correct: 什么, 怎么, 谁, 哪里
options: 什么, 怎么, 谁, 哪里
已经, 刚, 还, 又
因为, 所以, 虽然, 但是
的, 地, 得, 了

exercises.question: Translate: 无论如何，我都会决定的。
exercises.correct: No matter what, I will make a decision.
options: No matter what, I will make a decision.
As long as I decide, it will work.
As soon as I decide, I'll tell you.
Maybe I will make a decision.

grammar_points.title: 疑问代词的活用 — Flexible Use of Question Words
grammar_points.explanation: In Chinese, question words (哪, 什么, 怎么, 谁) can function as indefinite pronouns, meaning 'whatever / wherever / however / whoever'. This is called 活用 (flexible use). 你去哪儿我就去哪儿 = Wherever you go, I go. 什么都行 = Anything is fine. 怎么都可以 = Any way works. 谁都知道 = Everyone knows.

examples.pinyin: Nǐ qù nǎr, wǒ jiù qù nǎr.
Suí biàn, shén me dōu kě yǐ.

exercises.question: What does 什么都行 mean?
Which sentence uses 怎么 as an indefinite pronoun?
option_pinyin: Zěn me zuò dōu kě yǐ.
Tā bù zhī dào zěn me bàn.

exercises.question: Translate: 你去哪儿，我就跟去哪儿。
options: You go somewhere; I'll stay here.
I'll go somewhere if you follow me.
No matter where, we go together.

exercises.question: What does 谁都知道 mean?
Fill in: ___你高兴，我___支持你的决定。(As long as you're happy, I'll support your decision.)

quiz.question: What does 跟 mean in '跟你一起去'?
What does 不管 mean?
What does 只要 mean?
quiz.correct: As long as / So long as
options: As long as / So long as

quiz.question: What does 随便 mean?
What does 反正 mean?
What does 算了 mean?
What does 无论 mean?
What does 决定 mean?
What does 哪怕 mean?
What does 选择 mean?
Which pattern means 'as soon as action 1, action 2'?
Fill in: 他___进来___坐下了。(As soon as he came in, he sat down.)
What does 无论如何 mean?
Complete: 不管去哪儿，我___跟你去。
What does 什么都行 mean?
What does 反正随便 mean?
What does 只要你高兴 mean?
What does 一来就走 mean?
quiz.correct: As soon as he arrives, he leaves
options: As soon as he arrives, he leaves
He came and then left later

quiz.question: What does 你决定吧 mean?
What does 跟你一起去 mean?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 大明，今天去哪儿玩？你决定吧。
lines.pinyin: Dà Míng, jīn tiān qù nǎr wán? Nǐ jué dìng ba.
lines.english: Da Ming, where should we go today? You decide.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 反正随便，你去哪儿我就跟去哪儿。
lines.pinyin: Fǎn zhèng suí biàn, nǐ qù nǎr wǒ jiù gēn qù nǎr.
lines.english: Anyway, whatever — wherever you go, I'll follow.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 那去公园？不管天气怎样，我们都可以去。
lines.pinyin: Nà qù gōng yuán? Bù guǎn tiān qì zěn yàng, wǒ men dōu kě yǐ qù.
lines.english: How about the park? No matter what the weather, we can go.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 好！只要你高兴，去哪儿都可以。我们无论如何都去。
lines.pinyin: Hǎo! Zhǐ yào nǐ gāo xìng, qù nǎr dōu kě yǐ. Wǒ men wú lùn rú hé dōu qù.
lines.english: Great! As long as you're happy, anywhere is fine. We'll go no matter what.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 哈哈，那就这样决定了！跟你一起去，肯定很开心。
lines.pinyin: Hā hā, nà jiù zhè yàng jué dìng le! Gēn nǐ yī qǐ qù, kěn dìng hěn kāi xīn.
lines.english: Haha, it's settled then! Going with you is definitely fun.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Yī chū mén jiù zǒu ba, bié děng le.
lines.english: Let's go as soon as we're out the door — no more waiting.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 小刚，我不知道选择哪个工作，怎么办？
lines.pinyin: Xiǎo Gāng, wǒ bù zhī dào xuǎn zé nǎ gè gōng zuò, zěn me bàn?
lines.english: Xiao Gang, I don't know which job to choose — what should I do?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 算了算了，别想太多。不管选哪个，都会有机会发展。
lines.pinyin: Suàn le suàn le, bié xiǎng tài duō. Bù guǎn xuǎn nǎ gè, dōu huì yǒu jī huì fā zhǎn.
lines.english: Forget it, forget it — don't overthink it. No matter which you choose, there'll be opportunities to grow.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 哪怕工资少一点，只要工作有意思就好。
lines.pinyin: Nǎ pà gōng zī shǎo yī diǎn, zhǐ yào gōng zuò yǒu yì si jiù hǎo.
lines.english: Even if the pay is a little lower, as long as the work is interesting, that's fine.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 对，反正你一决定，就马上告诉我。
lines.pinyin: Duì, fǎn zhèng nǐ yī jué dìng, jiù mǎ shàng gào su wǒ.
lines.english: Right — anyway, as soon as you decide, tell me right away.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 好，无论如何，谢谢你的支持！
lines.pinyin: Hǎo, wú lùn rú hé, xiè xie nǐ de zhī chí!
lines.english: Okay, no matter what — thank you for your support!
